projectDescription: Open Minecraft name mappings under Creative Commons Zero, providing human-readable names for Minecraft's obfuscated classes, methods, and fields for mod development.
keyFeatures: 6500+ human-readable name mappings for Minecraft classes, methods, and fields
Creative Commons Zero license — free for all use without restrictions
Enigma GUI integration for easy visual mapping editing
Unpick definitions for expanding obfuscated integer constants into named enums
Javadoc generation for fully documented deobfuscated Minecraft API
Tiny v2 mapping format support with intermediary and named namespaces
Gradle build system with tasks for building, validating, and publishing mappings
Automated checks to ensure mapping quality and consistency
publicApiSurface: yarn Gradle task — launch Enigma editor with current mappings
yarnCommon Gradle task — launch Enigma showing only common (shared client/server) classes
build Gradle task — produce tiny mapping archive and javadoc jar
mapNamedJar Gradle task — generate deobfuscated Minecraft jar with yarn names
decompileCFR / decompileVineflower Gradle tasks — decompile mapped source code
formatMappings Gradle task — normalize and sort mapping files
checkMappings Gradle task — validate mapping correctness
net.fabricmc:yarn Maven artifact — published to maven.fabricmc.net
mappings/mappings.tiny — Tiny v1 merged mapping file inside published jar
